task_completion.description: Create a new dashboard named 'Customer Monthly Report'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Graphite dashboard UI with the title 'Customer Monthly Report' displayed at the top of the screen or in the dashboard configuration/save dialog.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Aggregate Fleet Compute' graph with stacked EC2 metrics and simplified legends
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph panel titled 'Aggregate Fleet Compute'. The graph should display stacked data (filled areas or stacked lines) representing EC2 CPU utilization. The legend below the graph must show short, simplified names (e.g., just the instance name) instead of the full 'servers.ec2_instance_...' metric paths.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Database Saturation Risk' graph with a thick red line
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph panel titled 'Database Saturation Risk'. The graph should display a single red line representing RDS CPU utilization that is noticeably thick (indicating lineWidth(3)).

task_completion.description: Create the 'Traffic Volume Trend' graph with a gray raw line and a thick blue trend line
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph panel titled 'Traffic Volume Trend'. The graph should display two lines: a gray line (labeled 'Raw' in the legend) and a smoother, thicker blue line (labeled 'Trend' in the legend, representing the moving average).

Look for a 'Dashboard saved' confirmation message, the save icon appearing in a saved state, or the dashboard name appearing in the URL/saved dashboards list, indicating the save action was successfully completed.

integrity.description: Agent used the Graphite web interface to build the dashboard
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Graphite web UI (adding panels, configuring metrics, applying functions) rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
The graph panels should show actual plotted data lines and areas, indicating that real metrics were successfully queried and rendered by Graphite, not just empty graph placeholders.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually write the dashboard JSON
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen writing or pasting the dashboard JSON configuration directly into a text editor or IDE to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dashboard name is 'Customer Monthly Report'. The task requires creating three specific graphs in the Graphite UI with exact titles, metrics, and styling functions applied (stacked, alias/aliasByNode, color, lineWidth, movingAverage). The environment uses real server metrics from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) dataset.
